---
title: "Episodes"
toc: true
---

Welcome to the **babbling books** library! Here you'll find every episode we've released, what chapters we covered, and where to listen.

## 🎙️ Available Episodes

<div class="episode-grid">

<div class="episode-card">

### Episode 1

## Project Hail Mary

**Chapters Covered:** 1–5

<div class="episode-links">
  <a href="https://youtube.com" target="_blank" aria-label="YouTube">
    <i class="bi bi-youtube"></i>
  </a>

  <a href="https://spotify.com" target="_blank" aria-label="Spotify">
    <i class="bi bi-spotify"></i>
  </a>
</div>

</div>

<div class="episode-card">

### Episode 2

## Project Hail Mary

**Chapters Covered:** 6–10

<div class="episode-links">
  <a href="https://youtube.com" target="_blank" aria-label="YouTube">
    <i class="bi bi-youtube"></i>
  </a>

  <a href="https://spotify.com" target="_blank" aria-label="Spotify">
    <i class="bi bi-spotify"></i>
  </a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="episode-card">

### Episode 3

## Project Hail Mary

**Chapters Covered:** 11–15

<div class="episode-links">
  <a href="https://youtube.com" target="_blank" aria-label="YouTube">
    <i class="bi bi-youtube"></i>
  </a>

  <a href="https://spotify.com" target="_blank" aria-label="Spotify">
    <i class="bi bi-spotify"></i>
  </a>
</div>

</div>

</div>

---

## 🔮 Coming Soon

<div class="episode-grid">

<div class="episode-card upcoming">

### Episode 4

## Project Hail Mary

**Planned Chapters:** 16–20

*Coming soon!*

</div>

<div class="episode-card upcoming">

### Episode 5

## Project Hail Mary

**Planned Chapters:** 21–25

*Coming soon!*

</div>

<div class="episode-card upcoming">

### Episode 6

## Project Hail Mary

**Planned Chapters:** 26–30

*Coming soon!*

</div>

</div>
